name: com.meertrack/mcp-server
title: Meertrack
description: Competitive intelligence — track what competitors ship each week. Wraps the Meertrack v1 API as 8 read-only tools and 3 prompt workflows for digests, activity feeds, and competitor profiles.

environmentVariables.name: MEERTRACK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Meertrack production API key (mt_live_…). Mint at Settings → API Keys.

environmentVariables.name: MEERTRACK_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional upstream override; defaults to https://api.meertrack.com/v1.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer mt_live_… — your Meertrack API key.
